overall.description: A cinematic drone flythrough of a futuristic urban waterfront plaza from the video game Cyberpunk 2077. The camera approaches and orbits a distinctive red retro-futuristic vehicle, then continues along the waterfront toward a tiered modern building, ascending concrete stairs under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban parking plaza with waterfront view

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the parking lot toward the red vehicle in the distance

entered.detail: large multi-tiered futuristic building with horizontal lines and extensive glass facades dominating the skyline
vintage-style red sports car with white roof, black trim, and distinctive red alloy wheels
modern building with warm wooden paneling and concrete sections featuring large windows
large pink digital billboard mounted on the building displaying the text ZEIG DICH

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a futuristic urban plaza, moving forward through an asphalt parking area. A distinctive tiered modern building dominates the background while a red vintage-futuristic car sits parked ahead. The camera approaches the vehicle steadily, passing by a building with wooden architectural accents on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: parking lot focused on vehicle inspection

events.description: camera transitions from linear forward movement to orbiting around the red vehicle

agents.ego_description: circling around the parked car to inspect from multiple angles, moving from rear to side to front views

entered.detail: tall building facade with vertical concrete lines and narrow vertical windows

segments.scene_description: The camera performs a smooth clockwise orbit around the red vehicle, revealing its design from multiple angles. The tiered building remains visible in the background while the surrounding parking lot and distant billboards shift in perspective. The wooden building from the start moves out of view as a concrete building facade appears on the right.

events.description: leaving the vehicle behind and transitioning toward the waterfront barrier area
approaching and beginning to ascend the wide concrete staircase

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade, passing pedestrians near the barrier, then moving up the concrete stairs into the tiered structure

notable_agents.action: person standing near the waterfront concrete barrier looking out toward the water
person walking along the promenade in the opposite direction of camera movement

entered.detail: low concrete barrier wall with metal railings separating the plaza from the waterfront
tall palm trees lining the edge of the waterfront area
vertical digital billboard displaying a portrait of a man in formal attire with text below
wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward into the tiered building
tall modern streetlight with distinctive angled orange fixture and vertical LED strip

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the vehicle and moves along the waterfront promenade, passing under the overhang of the tiered building. A concrete barrier separates the walkway from the water, with palm trees visible in the distance. The camera passes pedestrians near the wall, approaches a large digital billboard, and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase leading up into the building structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic urban plaza that transitions from a focused study of a vintage vehicle into an ascent up a modern waterfront structure. It begins by gliding across an asphalt parking area toward a red retro-futuristic car, passing a building with wooden architectural accents. As the camera reaches the vehicle, it performs a smooth clockwise orbit to reveal the car's design against a backdrop of distant billboards and a tiered modern building. The scene then shifts as the camera leaves the vehicle to follow the waterfront promenade, passing pedestrians and palm trees under the overhang of the tiered architecture. Finally, the movement carries the viewer past a large digital billboard before ascending a wide concrete staircase leading up into the building structure.
